markdown_report:
# In-Depth Research Report for http://primodato.com/

### Offerings
B2B Data Intelligence platform providing technographic and firmographic data, AI-powered search (natural language), and prospect list building tools.

### Pricing Models
Credit-based system where users pay for revealed profiles; Subscription plans include Starter ($49/mo - 1000 credits), Growth ($199/mo - 5000 + 500 bonus credits), and Enterprise (custom pricing).

### Terms And Conditions
No credit card required to start with 200 free credits; Credits never expire; Data is GDPR and CCPA compliant; Terms include specific policies for Refund, Usage, and Processing.

### Core Business Activities
Data collection/verification from public sources, AI & ML enrichment, human verification of high-value records, and providing a platform for B2B sales and marketing teams to find, qualify, and reach target accounts through technographic filtering.

### Companies Mentioned
- {'company_name': 'Hyatt', 'details': 'Hotel and hospitality brand mentioned as an example of the industry covered by PrimoDato.'}
